description: A black rounded shape with a flat bottom and a smaller curved shape on top, symbolizing the concept of a head.
A black arrow pointing upwards, conveying the concept of direction or heading towards a goal or progress.
A solid black shape resembling a human head, symbolizing the concept of a person's head or mind.
A black rounded shape with a smaller oval at the bottom, symbolizing the concept of a head.
A circular shape with a smaller oval at the bottom, symbolizing the concept of a head.
